_comment: Canon config for nemesis.mjs (Agent #3) — committable, tunable, NOT PII. axis_cluster_min_concepts = distinct concepts needed on one axis before the cross-concept 'kind of thinking' pattern surfaces. recency_halflife_days = decay for the recency-weighted score (older misses sink). warming_up_min_reps = the single volume gate (below it: low_confidence + axis_pattern suppressed). healed_clean_streak = clean reps on a topic before it closes (beaten opponent). closed_prune_days = drop long-stale closed entries so the list never grows endless. A deliberate SEED — retune from real data. nemesis.mjs READS this only (single-writer preserved); if missing, these same values are the built-in defaults.
